title: READDI protocol: Crystallisation of Dengue NS5 RdRp in I222

steps: Protein and buffer requirements: 30 µL 12 mg/mL Sample 2.9 mL, Crystallisation screen 14.4 µL, Dengue NS5 seeds , dilution 1:5000

Dispense 30 µL, Crystallisation screen into SwissCI 3 lens plate reservoir wells using a 100 µl multi-channel pipette. Dispense 100 nL, Dengue NS5 protein 12 mg/mL to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Dispense 150 nL, Crystallisation screen to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Dispense 50 nL, Dengue NS5 Seeds to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Drop ratio: 2:3:1 ratio (100 nl Protein: 150 nl Crystallisation solution: 50 nl Seeds) Final drop volume: 300 nl

Crystallisation screen composition: 0.1 Molarity (M) MES pH 6.7 0.35 Molarity (M) MgCl 2 10 % (w/v) PEG 4000 Stock solutions used: 1 Molarity (M) MES pH 6.7 5 Molarity (M) MgCl 2 50 % (w/v) PEG 4000 The crystallisation screen can be stored in a Duran bottle or aliquoted into 96 deep-well blocks for easy dispensing into SwissCI 3 lens plates. For long-term storage keep the crystallisation screen in the fridge at 4°C.

The crystals reach their maximum size after 3 to 5 d. Crystals typically form as chunky, often layered, needles. Morphology: long, thin or chunky needles Size: ~400 μm in length Appearance : needle clusters Average resolution: 1.9 Å Space group: I222 Unit cell: 83 Å, 117 Å, 149 Å 90°, 90°, 90° An example of a drop containing DENV2 NS5 RdRp crystals.

Incubate at 20 °C for 120:00:00 in Formulatrix Rock Imager. Imaging Schedule : The first images are taken after 12 h and the imaging schedule follows a Fibonacci sequence of days for further collections.

Formulatrix Rock Imager (or incubator of choice) SPT mosquito Mosquito HV (High Volume 16-Channel Robotic Liquid Handler, SPT LabTech, 3097-01057, https://www.sptlabtech.com/products/liquid-handling/mosquito-hv/ ) P100 8 multi-channel pipette SwissCI 3 lens plate
Prepare seed stock: Diamond XChem Seeding Protocol by Peter Marples 1: 5000 dilution Sample seeds

Diamond Light Source Unattended Data Collection (UDC) Data Collection Temperature: 100K Detector: DECTRIS EIGER2 XE 9M Beamline: I04-1 Wavelength: 0.9212 Å Resolution (Å): 1.62 Beam Size (μm): 60 X 50 Number of images: 3600 Oscillation: 0.10° Exposure (s): 0.0020 Transmission (%): 100 Flux (ph/s): 3.80e+12
creator: Peter Marples
